commands.review_summary:
The PR adds trusted-proxy and protocol documentation notes about missing-device WebSocket scope clearing, `x-openclaw-scopes` scope, troubleshooting, and `dangerouslyDisableDeviceAuth` guidance.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection and existing tests on current main show the mismatch: the WebSocket handler reads `x-openclaw-scopes`, the control-ui auth suite asserts it bounds trusted-proxy WebSocket scopes, and the clearing predicate excludes `trustedProxyAuthOk`.
commands.review_followup: Contributor or maintainer should correct the docs and add real rendered/runtime proof; automation should not repair a proof-gated external PR on the contributor's behalf.

target.title: docs: clarify trusted-proxy WebSocket scope clearing behavior
